name: Stickman Rope Heroes
description: Have you ever seen a stickman throwing a web before? yes he is throwing net and trying to reach the finish line to fulfill his mission. Net and jump at all marked locations. Help him as a stickman superhero and network together. Reach the finish line without falling off the cliff in different difficulty levels.
instructions: Click or tap to rope 20 different challenging levels
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Action, Adventure, Click, Stickman, Superhero
